programs.title: The Island
programs.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being."

programs.title: Paycheck
programs.desc: Michael Jennings works on top-secret projects. After each job, his memory is erased.

programs.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programs.desc: After a car crash, a woman wakes up in a survivalist’s bunker. He claims to have saved her

programs.title: Super 8
programs.desc: During the summer of 1979, a group of friends witness a train crash and investigate events in their town.

programs.title: The Crow
programs.desc: A young rock guitarist who, along with his fiancée, is brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals.

programs.title: The Core
programs.desc: Astronauts travel to the earth's core to detonate a bomb before the core superheats and destroys all life.
